input.command:
echo "=== pods ==="
kubectl get pods -n elasticsearch -o wide
echo "=== sts ==="
kubectl get statefulset -n elasticsearch
echo "=== pvc ==="
kubectl get pvc -n elasticsearch
echo "=== events (recent) ==="
kubectl get events -n elasticsearch --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -40

input.command:
kubectl get pods -n elasticsearch -o wide
echo "=== describe es-cluster-2 ==="
kubectl describe pod es-cluster-2 -n elasticsearch | tail -40

=== describe es-cluster-2 ===
    Environment:
      POD_NAME:      es-cluster-2 (v1:metadata.name)
      ES_JAVA_OPTS:  -Xms512m -Xmx512m
    Mounts:
      /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml from es-config (rw,path="elasticsearch.yml")
      /usr/share/elasticsearch/data from data (rw)
      /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount from kube-api-access-vsq5k (ro)

  Type                        Status
  PodReadyToStartContainers   True 
  Initialized                 True 
  Ready                       False 
  ContainersReady             False 
  PodScheduled                True 
Volumes:
  data:
    Type:       PersistentVolumeClaim (a reference to a PersistentVolumeClaim in the same namespace)
    ClaimName:  data-es-cluster-2
    ReadOnly:   false
  es-config:
    Type:      ConfigMap (a volume populated by a ConfigMap)
    Name:      es-config
    Optional:  false
  kube-api-access-vsq5k:
    Type:                    Projected (a volume that contains injected data from multiple sources)
    TokenExpirationSeconds:  3607
    ConfigMapName:           kube-root-ca.crt
    Optional:                false
    DownwardAPI:             true
QoS Class:                   Burstable
Node-Selectors:              <none>

input.command: kubectl get configmap es-config -n elasticsearch -o jsonpath='{.data.elasticsearch\.yml}'

content.content:
cluster.name: es-cluster
node.name: 
node.roles: [ master, data, ingest ]
network.host: 0.0.0.0
discovery.seed_hosts:
  - es-cluster-0.es-cluster.default.svc.cluster.local
  - es-cluster-1.es-cluster.default.svc.cluster.local
  - es-cluster-2.es-cluster.default.svc.cluster.local
cluster.initial_master_nodes:
  - es-cluster-0
  - es-cluster-1
  - es-cluster-2
node.store.allow_mmap: false
xpack.security.enabled: false
xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled: false
xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled: false

input.command:
kubectl get svc -n elasticsearch
echo "---sts spec (env, volumes)---"
kubectl get statefulset es-cluster -n elasticsearch -o yaml | sed -n '/spec:/,/volumeClaimTemplates/p' | head -100

content.content:
NAME         TYPE        CLUSTER-IP      EXTERNAL-IP   PORT(S)    AGE
es-cluster   ClusterIP   None            <none>        9300/TCP   2m58s
es-http      ClusterIP   10.96.186.138   <none>        9200/TCP   2m58s
---sts spec (env, volumes)---
spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: es-cluster
  serviceName: es-cluster
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: es-cluster
    spec:
      containers:
      - env:
        - name: POD_NAME
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.name
        - name: ES_JAVA_OPTS
          value: -Xms512m -Xmx512m
        image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.17.9
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: elasticsearch
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9200
          name: http
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 9300
          name: transport
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          failureThreshold: 6
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          tcpSocket:
            port: 9200
          timeoutSeconds: 1
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: "1"
            memory: 2Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File

        - mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml
